items.name: Ops ES/MS Student Scheduler (GSheet Prep or App?)
items.creator: Jabari

notes.purpose: We should be mindful of when we're using the right tool for the job. Hyperscale LLMs like Claude are deceptively simple. They're heavy machinery but have the appearance of a simple tool. Perhaps a locally deployed model is better suited for something like a chatbot. There's reason to believe that costs are artificially low because AI companies are not accountable for all of their resource consumption (electric, water). Therefore, we should strive to make prompts thorough and reduce round trips (i.e token usage). https://claude.ai/code/session_01M5qRBFEauSWmRNYTfgymGY https://claude.ai/share/992c2135-bc38-4170-baca-230893b4e2b8

items.name: Next Generation Seat Tracker + Renewal App
items.creator: Cristina

notes.purpose: The Seat Tracker is used by several teams to: Communicate staffing models for the year (Finance → School Leadership) Assign teammates to available seats (School Leadership) Track currently and potentially open seats to plan recruitment efforts (School Leadership → Talent Acquisition) Track progress to staffing open seats (Talent Acquisition) Track Renewal decisions and port data to Renewal Approval Tool (School Leadership → Talent Acquisition/Employee Relations) The data flows to a Tableau workbook where Talent Acquisition team can communicate hiring progress and track their goals over time. Data also flows to Renewal Approval Tool to create renewal offers and approval routing of teammates in positions for the following school year. Eliminate $10/user/month fee for use of AppSheet ($12,000 annually), which has been plagued with sync issues and lack of support and development from Google.
notes.audience: Talent Acquisition, School Leadership, Finance, Employee Relations
nextSteps: Feature: All-in-one data entry and dashboard (no more switching to Tableau for data viz)
Feature: Integrate with Renewal approval process (no more switching to another tool to audit salary/title changes and create renewal letters)
Next Steps: Connect with Talent Acquisition team to discuss AppSheet limitations/pain points and gauge wish list for next iteration of the app.

notes.purpose: Replace current system of all different URLs for Tableau tools and Google sheets with one megasite for data access and visualizations created and version controlled in code using whatever tool is best for the job (charting libraries, Streamlit, Javascript) Offer new self service data tools pulling pre-defined metrics from Semantic Layer Offer new LLM "talk to the data" functionality to every dataset
notes.timeline: Rolled out gradually as we build semantic layer over 2026-2027
nextSteps: Next steps: Use Claude to supercharge semantic layer development (suggesting star schema design based on current reporting views, creating new dimensional and fact tables, creating yaml files for metadata and metric definitions).
Feature: Replace Tableau with self-hosted visualization and analysis website that reads from the semantic layer directly (no more individual calculations spread amongst various tools)
Feature: Ability to limit access to internal users but also create publicly available websites for outside users and the Board
productionAudit: Semantic Layer Product Selection Happening < 1 week
Need Auth + Permissions (including approved Job Groupings to stamp global access rules)

notes.purpose: Dramatically speed up process of converting wide reporting tables to star schema (facts and dims) by having Claude analyze the reporting views and suggest and create new facts and dims.
notes.timeline: Rolled out gradually as we build semantic layer over 2026-2027
productionAudit: All pieces in place, just need to meet as a team to validate output and plan.
Investigate Cube API compatibility and see if we can write our yaml with schema and metadata directly to Cube and then use Cube UI to build out metrics only.

items.name: landing page for data team apps/tools on kippteamandfamily.org
items.creator: Kevin

notes.purpose: KIPP Forward team uses a Google sheet to track certain career prep milestones for alums and needed a solution that enabled roll-ups with updating student information from Salesforce (school attended, degree, expected graduation date). Originally going to replace Google sheet manual entry with an AppSheet. Used Claude to create a Next.js app that reads and writes to the database and has a nice clean UI to use.
nextSteps: Connect to OAuth for Google authentication
Create automation to add students with upcoming graduation dates to add to contact list.
Integrating data entry with analysis and visualizations
